case_title: LUXOR CAB COMPANY VS TAKAHASHI, CLARICE M.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAKAHASHI, CLARICE M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUXOR CAB COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TAKAHASHI, CLARICE M. DEFENDANT REQUEST LATE FILING OF COUNTER CLAIM. PLAINTIFF AGREES TO HEARING BOTH PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANT'S CLAIM, HEARD TODAY IN OPEN COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,604.95 FILED BY LUXOR CAB COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TAKAHASHI, CLARICE M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TAKAHASHI, CLARICE M. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TAKAHASHI, CLARICE M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
